description: Maps external service fields to shared layer fields. Each entry specifies: source field path (dot notation), target shared file + field path, and transformation rules.
target_shared_files: List of .claude/shared/*.json files this adapter writes to

validation_rules.description: Numeric fields are considered consistent if within 5% of existing value. Categorical fields must match exactly. New fields (null → value) are always consistent. Measured data superseding estimated data is always consistent.
